title: The Rainbow Mountains That Look Painted

segments.text: These mountains look like a colorful painting.
You'll find it in Gansu Province, China.
Their colors are due to red sandstone and minerals.
The landscape is millions of years in the making.
A natural wonder that defies imagination.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Zhangye Danxia, Gansu Province — China. Mountains that appear painted in vibrant colors. Discover nature's artistry! Follow for daily hidden places! 🎨
